---
title: " "
date: last-modified
execute:   
  freeze: auto  # re-render only when source changes
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: false
    highlight-style: pygments
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE, echo = FALSE}
## load packages
packs.html <- c("knitr", "pander", "reporttools", "dplyr", "readxl")
for (i in 1:length(packs.html)){library(packs.html[i], character.only = TRUE)}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

path <- getwd()
source(paste(path, "/tools/colFmt.r", sep = ""))
```

# EFSPI statistical methodology leaders

In September 2023 EFSPI founded a new group _EFSPI statistical methodology leaders_, bringing together methodology leaders to work on topics of common interest.

Find more context in this [linkedin post](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/kasparrufibach_biostatistics-statistics-drugdevelopment-activity-7084613881087578113-teIX/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop) and [this slidedeck](methods/material/20230913_EFSPI_methodology_group_linkedin.pdf).

# Feedback 

For feedback and questions send an email to [efspieurope@gmail.com](efspieurope@gmail.com).

# EFSPI

[EFSPI](http://www.efspi.org).
